title: Work effectively in a pest management environment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Work effectively in a pest management environment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Demonstrate basic understanding of pest management principles

pcs.text: Identify common invasive pests according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify common invasive pests according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify common invasive pests according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Identify characteristics of pest species and their impacts on the community and environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify characteristics of pest species and their impacts on the community and environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify characteristics of pest species and their impacts on the community and environment.

pcs.text: Identify workplace pest management plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace pest management plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace pest management plans.

pcs.text: Recognise workplace strategies for pest management according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise workplace strategies for pest management according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise workplace strategies for pest management according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Identify and recognise the effects of pests on workplace performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and recognise the effects of pests on workplace performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and recognise the effects of pests on workplace performance.

pcs.text: Identify and apply personal responsibilities according to workplace procedures and pest management practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and apply personal responsibilities according to workplace procedures and pest management practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and apply personal responsibilities according to workplace procedures and pest management practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Demonstrate basic understanding of pest management principles

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify licenses, permits and permissions required to enter a property for the purpose of pest management activities.
